Bash(rm -f v2-*.png v3-*.png v4-*.png v5-*.png v6-*.png ds-preview*.png shot-*.png)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("D:\\pre-sales\\Ajam\\tall.png"\); Write-Output "H=$\($src.Height\)"; $bandH=1200; for\($y=2400;$y -lt $src.Height -and $y -lt 6400;$y+=$bandH\){ $h=[Math]::Min\($bandH,$src.Height-$y\); $bmp=New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($src.Width,$h\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src,\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$src.Width,$h\)\),\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,$y,$src.Width,$h\)\),[System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("D:\\pre-sales\\Ajam\\band_$y.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\);$bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "band_$y.png" }; $src.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("D:\\pre-sales\\Ajam\\tall.png"\); $bandH=520; foreach\($y in 2900,3420,3940\){ $h=[Math]::Min\($bandH,$src.Height-$y\); $bmp=New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($src.Width,$h\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src,\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$src.Width,$h\)\),\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,$y,$src.Width,$h\)\),[System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("D:\\pre-sales\\Ajam\\slice_$y.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\);$bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "slice_$y.png" }; $src.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("D:\\pre-sales\\Ajam\\full.png"\); $bandH=620; $i=0; for\($y=1900;$y -le 5400;$y+=$bandH\){ $h=[Math]::Min\($bandH,$src.Height-$y\); if\($h -le 0\){break}; $bmp=New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($src.Width,$h\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src,\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$src.Width,$h\)\),\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,$y,$src.Width,$h\)\),[System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("D:\\pre-sales\\Ajam\\b$i`_$y.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\);$bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "b$i`_$y.png"; $i++ }; $src.Dispose\(\))
